blogPage.metaDescription: Read our latest reflections and teachings on our blog. Join us on this journey of faith and growth.

blogPage.description: Discover our latest reflections and see how we continue growing as a community.
blogPage.keywords: blog, articles, reflections, teachings, faith, growth, community, redentor

blogSection.title: Latest from the blog
blogSection.description: Discover our latest reflections and teachings. Join us on this journey of faith and learning.

conectemosPage.title: Come to Meet Us
conectemosPage.description: Get in touch with us. Find our location, activity schedules, and learn how to be part of our community in Buenos Aires.
conectemosPage.keywords: contact, church, Buenos Aires, community, redentor
conectemosPage.ogDescription: Reach out to learn more about our church and how you can be part of our community.

contactCta.title: Join a diverse and loving community, where we get to know Jesus together.

message.line-1: We are preparing an online experience that reflects the warmth, love, and call to vocation of our community.
message.line-2: At the Redentor Church of Christ, we are dedicated to proclaiming the good news of the Kingdom of God and living out Jesus’ transformative example, inviting you to respond to his personal call to service and commitment.

metadata.title: Redentor Church of Christ - Connecting, Communicating, and Growing
metadata.description: Welcome to the Redentor Church of Christ. Soon you will discover a site that reflects faith, vocation, and love.

notify.descriptions: Soon, we will invite you to connect with our message and mission, walking with us on a journey of faith, service, and transformation. Stay tuned for our launch!

comunidadPage.title: Our Community
comunidadPage.description: Learn more about our community in Buenos Aires. We are a family of faith, united by Christ’s love, and we share our lives in fellowship.
comunidadPage.keywords: community, church, Buenos Aires, faith, christians, redentor
comunidadPage.ogDescription: Discover our community in Buenos Aires, where we live and share Christ’s love together.

homePage.title: Welcome to Iglesia de Cristo Redentor
homePage.description: Stay informed about our activities and stay connected with the community.
homePage.ogDescription: Connect with the Christ community and join our activities in Buenos Aires.

footer.copyright: Redentor Church of Christ. All rights reserved.
footer.description: Christ is the center of everything we do. Our mission is to guide people into a personal relationship with Jesus Christ.
footer.poweredBy: Made with ♥️ from Buenos Aires, Argentina by GD

ourMission.title: Our mission
ourMission.description1: Discover how we live and share Jesus’ love in a way that transforms lives and communities.
ourMission.description2: There’s so much more we want to share with you. Learn more about our mission and how you can be part of this transformation.

quienEsJesusPage.title: Who is Jesus?
quienEsJesusPage.description: Explore who Jesus is, the center of our faith. Discover his message of love, redemption, and hope for all humanity.
quienEsJesusPage.keywords: Jesus, redemption, hope, salvation, Christianity, redentor
quienEsJesusPage.ogDescription: Learn who Jesus is and how his message of love and redemption can transform your life.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to our newsletter
subscribe.description: Stay informed about our activities and stay connected with the community.
